languages.text: {n}Разговор прерывает громкая бинарная трель, которую издает один из ваших сервочерепов. Механический бур с жужжанием впился в бок конструкции когитатора и что-то в нем переключает. Через мгновение вы слышите громкий щелчок: где-то среди ледяных глыб открылась потайная дверь.{/n}

{n}A loud binharic trill from one of your servo-skulls interrupts the conversation. Its buzzing mechanical drill bores into the side of the cogitator frame and activates something inside it. A moment later, you hear a loud click as a secret door opens somewhere amid the ice blocks.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Разговор прерывает громкая бинарная трель, которую издает один из ваших сервочерепов. Механический бур с жужжанием впился в бок конструкции когитатора и что-то в нем переключает. Через мгновение вы слышите громкий щелчок: где-то среди ледяных глыб открылась потайная дверь.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}A loud binary trill from one of your servo-skulls interrupts the conversation. Its buzzing mechanical bore drills into the side of the cogitator frame and switches something inside it. A moment later, you hear a loud click as a secret door opens somewhere amid the ice blocks.{/n}

{n}A loud binharic trill from one of your servo-skulls interrupts the conversation. Its buzzing mechanical drill bores into the side of the cogitator frame and activates something inside it. A moment later, you hear a loud click as a secret door opens somewhere amid the ice blocks.{/n}

{n}A loud binharic trill from one of your servo-skulls interrupts the conversation. Its buzzing mechanical drill bores into the side of the cogitator frame and activates something inside it. A moment later, you hear a loud click as a secret door opens somewhere amid the ice blocks.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ein lautes binhärisches Trillern von einem deiner Servoschädel unterbricht das Gespräch. Sein summender mechanischer Bohrer gräbt sich in die Seite des Cogitator-Gehäuses und aktiviert etwas im Inneren. Einen Augenblick später hörst du ein lautes Klicken, als sich irgendwo in den Eisblöcken eine Geheimtür öffnet.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A loud binharic trill from one of your servo-skulls interrupts the conversation. Its buzzing mechanical drill bores into the side of the cogitator frame and activates something inside it. A moment later, you hear a loud click as a secret door opens somewhere amid the ice blocks.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ein lautes binhärisches Trillern von einem deiner Servoschädel unterbricht das Gespräch. Sein summender mechanischer Bohrer gräbt sich in die Seite des Cogitator-Gehäuses und aktiviert etwas im Inneren. Einen Augenblick später hörst du ein lautes Klicken, als sich irgendwo in den Eisblöcken eine Geheimtür öffnet.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La conversation est interrompue par un bruyant trille binhaire émanant de l'un de vos servocrânes. Son foret mécanique vrombissant perce la paroi latérale du cogitateur et active quelque chose à l'intérieur. Un instant plus tard, un cliquetis vous indique qu'une porte dérobée s'est ouverte quelque part parmi les blocs de glace.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A loud binharic trill from one of your servo-skulls interrupts the conversation. Its buzzing mechanical drill bores into the side of the cogitator frame and activates something inside it. A moment later, you hear a loud click as a secret door opens somewhere amid the ice blocks.{/n}

Un instant plus tard, un cliquetis vous indique qu'une porte dérobée s'est ouverte quelque part parmi les blocs de glace.{/n}

languages.text: {n}其中一颗伺服头骨发出了响亮的二进制语颤音，打断了谈话。它的机械钻头嗡嗡作响，刺入了沉思者外壳侧面，激活了里面的机构。过了一会儿，你听到了一声响亮的“咔哒”声，冰块中间某处的秘门打开了。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A loud binharic trill from one of your servo-skulls interrupts the conversation. Its buzzing mechanical drill bores into the side of the cogitator frame and activates something inside it. A moment later, you hear a loud click as a secret door opens somewhere amid the ice blocks.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El sonoro gorjeo binario de uno de tus servocráneos interrumpe la conversación. Su taladro mecánico zumba y atraviesa el lateral del cogitador, activando algo en su interior. Un momento después, oyes un fuerte chasquido y una puerta secreta se abre entre los bloques de hielo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A loud binharic trill from one of your servo-skulls interrupts the conversation. Its buzzing mechanical drill bores into the side of the cogitator frame and activates something inside it. A moment later, you hear a loud click as a secret door opens somewhere amid the ice blocks.{/n}

languages.text: {n}サーヴォスカルの一つから大きなバイナリックの音が響いて、会話を妨げた。機械式ドリルが考算機のフレームに穴を開けて内部の何かを起動した。少し後に、カチッと大きな音がして、氷のブロックに隠されていた扉が開いた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A loud binharic trill from one of your servo-skulls interrupts the conversation. A moment later, you hear a loud click as a secret door opens somewhere amid the ice blocks.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Hizmeletlerinden biri, gür bir ikilidil nağmeyle konuşmayı keser. Vızıldayan mekanik matkabı, kavramsayar kasasının yanını delip içerdeki bir şeyi etkinleştirir. Ardından tok bir tık sesi işitirsin ve buz kütleleri arasında saklı bir kapı aralanır.{/n}

A moment later, you hear a loud click as a secret door opens somewhere amid the ice blocks.{/n}
